title: Coral 72204 Essentials 100 Sqm (2M X 50M) Polythene Dust Sheet Roll Drop Cover Spill Splash Protection for Painting
features: Looking for a polythene dust sheets for protection against dust, paint, and dirt? Would you prefer a cost effective roll that can be cut to size? Do you want a 100 square meter (2m x 50m) dust sheet?
You'll benefit from temporary barrier protection against dust, paint, dirt and moisture. Ideal for decorating, gardening, DIY and general use.
This dust sheet roll is produced from thin polythene for lightweight, dustproof and waterproof surface protection.
You'll unfold the sheet and lay it over the surface you intend to protect. To keep polythene dust sheets in place, edges can be secured with masking tape.
Choose great value for money and good basic dust sheet for general use.
description: From the manufacturer We’re here to make it easier for people to improve their surroundings. To all those seeking better results, Coral is a progressive tool brand creating innovative products designed to enhance your performance and help you to succeed. Our mission is to design tools and equipment to make decorating projects easier, faster, and more affordable than ever before. Trusted by skilled tradespeople and homeowners alike, our popular lines include paint brushes, paint rollers, wallpaper tools, and decorators’ preparation tools.
